items.title: RoachClaw Quickstart
items.subtitle: Contained qwen2.5-coder:1.5b model
items.summary: Get RoachClaw talking quickly on a clean machine with the small contained coding model RoachNet already recommends for first boot.
items.machineFit: Best on all Apple Silicon Macs, especially 16 GB machines
includes: Contained Ollama-backed model download
Fastest local coding lane for first launch
Cloud lane can stay available while the model warms up

items.title: RoachClaw Studio
items.subtitle: Contained qwen2.5-coder:7b upgrade
items.summary: Move up to the larger local coding lane for longer refactors, stronger reasoning, and more comfortable day-to-day coding assist.
items.machineFit: Best on M2 Pro, Max, and higher-memory Apple Silicon
includes: Contained 7B coding model queue
RoachClaw workbench handoff in the native shell
Better room for heavier coding and agent tasks

items.title: RoachClaw Generalist
items.subtitle: Contained qwen2.5:7b everyday model
items.summary: A broader local model for notes, drafting, planning, and general assistant work when you want something less coding-specific than the default lane.
items.machineFit: Best on Macs with enough memory for a comfortable always-on local lane
includes: Contained general-purpose local model
Works well for notes, drafts, summaries, and planning
RoachNet still keeps the cloud lane optional

items.title: RoachClaw Coder Large
items.subtitle: Contained qwen2.5-coder:14b lane
items.summary: A bigger local coding model for machines with real headroom and users who want the strongest local-first Dev Studio pairing RoachNet can comfortably stage.
items.machineFit: Best on higher-memory Apple Silicon and Exo-assisted setups
includes: Contained 14B coding model queue
Pairs well with Exo-enabled multi-machine routing
Intended for serious local coding sessions
